root_cause: CI workflow had no lint/type-check steps; ruff/mypy/pyflakes regressions would pass silently
fix_summary: Added 3 new CI steps: ruff check src/ tests/, python -m mypy src/, python -m pyflakes src/; added ruff mypy pyflakes to pip install line
post_state: 3 steps added; all pass on current HEAD
